title: stevia glomerata
intro: Stevia glomerata, a perennial plant native to South America, is a member of the Asteraceae family and is also known as a wild stevia or chrysanthemum-leaved stevia. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and promote oral health. The plant is also rich in antioxidants and has been shown to have various health benefits, such as reducing blood pressure, improving blood sugar control, and supporting immune function. Stevia glomerata can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and its leaves can also be consumed fresh as a natural sweetener, although it is essential to note that the plant should be used under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
